title: Lenovo Thinkpad T14s Gen2 11th Gen i7-1185G7 3.00GHz 16GB 256GB Win11P IRIS 3751
shortDescription: LENOVO THINKPAD T14S GEN 2 - (REFURBISHED). Video Adapter : TigerLake-LP GT2 [Iris Xe Graphics]. Item has been Professionally Refurbished in-house and every single aspect of the PC has been rigorously tested.
conditionDescription: This computer has been professionally refurbished and will turn on as a brand new computer would. Functionality: Everything is working as intended. Cosmetics: This computer is in Good Condition with just some standard wear and tear such as scuffs / light wear on trackpad and or keys. (SEE PICTURES). R2V3 Grading: C4: Used Good / F5: Refurbished Comes with a used OEM Charger. ALL LAPTOPS IN THIS LISTING ARE IN SIMILAR CONDITION. Grade - B
description:
Lenovo Thinkpad T14s Gen2 11th Gen i7-1185G7 3.00GHz 16GB 256GB Win11P IRIS 3751

LENOVO THINKPAD T14S GEN 2 - (REFURBISHED)

The LENOVO THINKPAD T14S GEN 2 Laptop delivers unsurpassed performance that is ideal for anyone who wants a fast and reliable computer. This laptop is equipped with an 11th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-1185G7 @ 3.00GHz Processor,16GB RAM, and 256GB NVMe drive.

Item has been Professionally Refurbished in-house and every single aspect of the PC has been rigorously tested. Microsoft Windows 11 Professional has been installed with all proper drivers and updated with all current updates available. PC will turn on as a brand-new PC would.

Additional Programs Installed:

LibreOffice / Google Chrome / Adobe Reader / Java / VLC Player

Please review the detailed specifications below.

  • CPU Type:11th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-1185G7 @ 3.00GHz
  • Memory Size:8
  • Total Memory:16GB
  • Hard Drive:256GB
  • Drive Type: NVMe
  • Screen Size:13.9"
  • Resolution:1920x1080
  • Video Adapter: TigerLake-LP GT2 [Iris Xe Graphics]
  • Network Adapter: Ethernet Connection (13) I219-LM, Wi-Fi 6 AX201
  • Ports: USB 1, USB 2, Headphone/Microphone Combo Jack1
  • Condition: Refurbished

Operating System: Windows 11 Professional

R2V3 Grading: C4: Used Good / F5: Refurbished

Features

Details

Fast and Free Shipping
You're already purchasing the item. Why pay additional for shipping, especially slow shipping? We get your order shipped out within 1-business day and delivered to your doorstep as quickly as possible.
Competitive Pricing
With our dynamic pricing model, our prices are always competitive. Our prices are some of the lowest that you will find on the internet. Rest assured that you're getting a good deal when purchasing with us.
30-day Money Back Guarantee
We are committed to making sure that you leave this transaction satisfied. If you're unhappy with the product for any reason, you may return it back for your money-back or a replacement within 30 days. No questions asked!

title: Lenovo ThinkPad L14 Gen 1 i5 10th Gen 16GB RAM 256GB SSD 20U1-002 Grade C No AC
conditionDescription: This used laptop is in Grade C condition, featuring a 256 GB storage capacity and intended for refurbishment as it does not come with an operating system. Minor cosmetic blemishes are present on the cabinet. Please note that an AC adapter is not included. Photo is a stock image.
description:
READY FOR REFURBISHMENT

This unit is intended for refurbishment. It may have defects, missing parts, or require repair.
See "Condition Description" below.

Lenovo ThinkPad L14 Gen 1 i5 10th Gen 16GB RAM 256GB SSD 20U1-002 Grade C No AC

*Unless otherwise noted, images are stock photos and may not represent the exact unit received.

Condition & Testing

  • Condition Notes:
    This used laptop is in Grade C condition, featuring a 256 GB storage capacity and intended for refurbishment as it does not come with an operating system. Minor cosmetic blemishes are present on the cabinet. Please note that an AC adapter is not included. Photo is a stock image.
  • Standard Testing Performed:
    Our laptops are tested to post to BIOS. The hard drive (if included) has been data-wiped. We test the LCD Screen, Keyboard, Trackpad, and at least one USB port.
    Note: Testing confirms the feature was checked; if a failure was found (e.g., bad pixels, dead keys), it is noted in the Condition Description above.
  • Screen Condition: Working
  • Battery Status: Yes, Grade A (50-100% OEM charge) (Runtime not guaranteed)

System Specifications

Brand / Model LENOVO THINKPAD L14 GEN 1 (MPN: 20U1-002)
Display 14" 1920x1080
(Laptop)
Processor CORE I5-10210U 1.60 GHZ @ 1.60 GHz
RAM 16 GB
Storage SSD: 256 GB
HDD: No HDD
Graphics Intel COMETLAKE-U GT2 [UHD ]
Features Wi-Fi
Connectivity Wi-Fi
Operating System Not Included
Included: Unit
AC Adapter / Charger: Not Included
Unless listed above, peripherals are not included. Batteries are considered consumable; while we test for functionality, remaining life/runtime is not warranted.


R2v3 Transparency & Grading

Cosmetic Grade:
C3 - Used Fair- Moderate use and Age

Data Sanitization:
Evaluated - not containing data (NIST 800-88 Compliant) 		R2 Applicability:
Not Applicable

Functionality Classification:
F3 - Key Functions Working (Appendix C)
Category Definition:
  • F3 - Key Functions Working (Appendix C – Test and Repair)
  • Key functions verified working; secondary functions may not be tested.
  • May have defects, missing non-essential parts, or missing hard drives.
  • Software not loaded.
  • F4 - Hardware Functional (Appendix C – Test and Repair)
  • All hardware tested and verified working. No missing parts.
  • Software not loaded/configured.
  • Functioning equipment is not subject to downstream R2 control.
  • F5 - Refurbished (Appendix C – Test and Repair)
  • Fully tested, repaired, and cosmetic defects rectified.
  • OS loaded and drivers installed. Ready for end-user.

Shipping & Handling

Combined Shipping:

Combined Shipping Discounts: Combined shipping discounts are available exclusively when using the Buy It Now feature. Please note that combined shipping discounts may not be available when using the Best Offer feature. All shipping costs paid are final and non-refundable. Be sure to review your shipping total before finalizing your purchase to ensure satisfaction with the amount.



Refunds:
Shipping costs are generally non-refundable, except in cases covered by eBay’s Money Back Guarantee (e.g., Item Not As Described). If a return is required, return shipping costs will be handled according to eBay’s standard policies and the specific return setting on this listing.

Customer Satisfaction & Future Transactions

We are a high-volume ITAD wholesaler operating on low margins to provide the best possible pricing. Our business model relies on the finality of sales.

While we honor all valid returns in accordance with eBay policies, we reserve the right to restrict future purchasing privileges for accounts that return items. Similarly, we restrict future transactions for accounts that leave neutral or negative feedback. We view a return or negative feedback as an indication that our product standards may not align with your specific needs, and we prefer to end the business relationship amicably to prevent future dissatisfaction.

Technical Support:
We specialize in hardware sales and do not offer technical support, software tutorials, or OS configuration assistance. Buyers are expected to possess the necessary technical expertise to set up, configure, and maintain the equipment purchased.

By placing a Bid, making a Best Offer, or making a Purchase, you agree to be bound by our Terms and Conditions.

TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SALE

By purchasing this item, the Buyer expressly agrees to the following terms, which form a binding contract between Buyer and Seller under the laws of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

  1. Sale of Goods & Payment. Seller agrees to sell and Buyer agrees to purchase the goods (the “Goods”) as listed in this eBay listing. All payments must be processed strictly through eBay Managed Payments. Solicitation for off-platform sales is prohibited.
    Non-Paying Buyers: Payment is due immediately upon purchase or auction end. Failure to remit payment within 4 days will result in order cancellation and a "Non-Paying Buyer" strike recorded on the Buyer’s account. Seller reserves the right to permanently block non-paying buyers from future transactions.
  2. Errors, Inaccuracies, and Right to Cancel.
    a. Pricing Errors: Seller strives for accuracy but does not warrant that product descriptions, pricing, or other content is error-free. In the event of a typographical error, technical glitch, or pricing mistake (e.g., a "decimal point error"), Seller reserves the right to cancel any orders placed for the item at the incorrect price, regardless of whether the order has been confirmed or payment received.
    b. Remedy: If an order is canceled due to a pricing error, Seller’s sole obligation is to issue a full refund. Buyer expressly waives any claim for "loss of bargain" or expectation damages resulting from such cancellation.
  3. Delivery and Risk of Loss ("Porch Piracy").
    a. Delivery Definition: Pursuant to a specific agreement between the parties (UCC § 2509(d)), Delivery is deemed legally complete when the common carrier (USPS, UPS, FedEx, etc.) marks the package as "Delivered" to the address provided in the Order Details.
    b. Transfer of Risk: Title and Risk of Loss pass entirely to the Buyer at the moment of the carrier’s delivery scan. Seller is not liable for theft, "porch piracy," or loss that occurs after the carrier claims delivery. Buyer is responsible for providing a secure delivery location.
    c. Freight Forwarders: Per eBay’s Money Back Guarantee policy, the use of freight forwarders, third-party logistics, or re-shipping services by the Buyer voids all Seller warranties and protections.
  4. Item Condition and Commercial Purpose.
    a. eBay Categories: The condition of the Goods is defined strictly by the eBay category selected for this listing:
    • "For Parts or Not Working": Goods are defective, incomplete, and sold strictly for scrap or harvesting. No functionality is guaranteed.
    • "Used" / "Refurbished": Goods have been previously used and may show signs of wear. Battery life and internal components are not guaranteed unless specified.
    • "New" / "Open Box": Goods are unused but may have opened packaging. Manufacturer warranties are not guaranteed by Seller.
    b. B2B / Commercial Transaction: Buyer acknowledges that these Goods are intended for commercial refurbishment, wholesale, or professional repair. Buyer represents they are purchasing for business or professional use, not for personal, family, or household use.
  5. Dangerous Nature of Goods & R2 Environmental Compliance.
    a. Hazards: Buyer acknowledges that used electronics may contain hazardous materials (lithium-ion batteries, capacitors, heavy metals).
    b. R2 Disposal Covenant: Seller is an R2-Certified facility. Buyer agrees that any components deemed "end-of-life" or "e-waste" must NOT be disposed of in municipal landfills. Buyer agrees to either: (i) process such waste through an R2-certified downstream vendor; or (ii) contact Seller to arrange prepaid return of the e-waste for proper recycling (subject to Seller’s approval of reasonable shipping costs).
    c. Assumption of Risk: Buyer voluntarily assumes all risks of personal injury, property damage, fire, or death resulting from the use, repair, modification, or disassembly of the Goods.
  6. Data Sanitization & Inadvertent Disclosure.
    a. Protocol: Seller performs industry-standard data sanitization on all devices. In the unlikely event Buyer discovers residual personal or proprietary data, Buyer agrees to: (i) Immediately cease use; (ii) Refrain from copying/distributing said data; (iii) Notify Seller within 24 hours; and (iv) Return the device to Seller for secure sanitization.
    b. Remedy: Seller will provide a prepaid label and refund/replacement. Buyer agrees to indemnify Seller against damages resulting from Buyer’s failure to report or unauthorized dissemination of such data.
  7. Disclaimer of Warranties.
    TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW (AND SPECIFICALLY PURSUANT TO 13 PA. CONS. STAT. § 2316), THE GOODS ARE SOLD "AS IS" AND "WITH ALL FAULTS." SELLER EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO ANY IMPLIED WARRANTY OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.
  8. Limitation of Liability & Indemnification.
    a. Liability Cap: Seller’s maximum liability shall be strictly limited to the purchase price paid plus original shipping costs.
    b. No Consequential Damages: IN NO EVENT SHALL SELLER BE LIABLE FOR SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOST PROFITS, DOWNTIME, LOSS OF GOODWILL, OR DAMAGE TO OTHER EQUIPMENT.
    c. Indemnity: Buyer agrees to indemnify and defend Seller against any third-party claims arising out of Buyer’s refurbishment, resale, or disposal of the Goods.
  9. Cumulative Remedies and Fraud.
    Seller reserves the right to pursue civil litigation against the Buyer for return fraud (e.g., swapping items, returning empty boxes) or abuse of eBay policies. An eBay Money Back Guarantee decision does not release the Buyer from civil liability for fraud or breach of contract.
  10. Governing Law, Jurisdiction, and Venue.
    [NOTICE]
    a. Governing Law: This Agreement is governed by the internal laws of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
    b. Exclusive Venue: Buyer consents to the exclusive jurisdiction and venue of the state courts of Westmoreland County, Pennsylvania. Buyer acknowledges that any fraud or breach causes injury occurring strictly within Pennsylvania.
    c. Wrongful Venue Costs: In the event Buyer files a lawsuit or claim against Seller in a jurisdiction other than Westmoreland County, PA, Buyer agrees to pay all of Seller’s reasonable attorneys’ fees and costs incurred to dismiss or transfer said action to the proper venue.
    d. Service: Buyer consents to service of process via Certified Mail to the address provided in the Order Details.
  11. Severability.
    If any provision of this Agreement is held to be invalid (including by eBay policy), such provision shall be severed, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force.
